name: Turbo Balls
short_description: Race through tricky tracks with up to 8 players online. Roll, jump, and bump past opponents to reach the finish line first! Choose your character, and customize your ball.
detailed_description:
Dive into the fast-paced world of Turbo Balls, an exhilarating multiplayer game full of competition, adrenaline, and the thrill of race victory! Choose your unique character, customize your ball with various skins, and challenge up to 8 players in real-time matches.
Game Features:

  • Skill-Based Races: Navigate tricky obstacle courses, narrow paths without guardrails, and sharp turns as you try not to fall into the abyss.

  • Coin Collection: Explore the tracks, collect coins, and upgrade your ball to outperform your rivals.

  • Leaderboards: Climb the global rankings and prove you’re the best among players from around the world.

  • Skins and Customization: Unlock new ball skins to stand out on the track and showcase your personal style.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Simplified Chinese
